title: Bunnyberg's Dynamic Brewing Stands
description: This mod makes brewing stands dynamically display potions. Fully customizable.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-2lsxKgaA1w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Default control to open UI: Press "O" (can be changed in keybinds)

Installation instructions:

-**Recommended to install Bunnyberg's PBR 3D items: [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pbr-items-bunnyberg)**

-Once Bunnyberg's PBR is installed enable the brewing stand using respackopts

-If you dont want to install Bunnyberg's PBR items disable the fuel and ingredients slot in the contoller. (press "O")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod makes brewing stands dynamically display potions. Fully customizable with up to 5 profile saves
